error_signature: unable to log the user in with the given response
title: Login endpoint returns challenge_id instead of auth token
symptom: When the login endpoint returns a challenge_id instead of an auth token, the user cannot be logged in, leading to an error in WeWeb.
applies_when: MFA is enabled for the user
not_this_if: The endpoint returns a valid auth token
MFA is not enabled for the user
root_cause: The login endpoint was designed to return a challenge_id when MFA is enabled, but WeWeb expects an auth token for successful login. This mismatch causes the workflow to fail without displaying the actual API response.
fix_steps: Modify the Xano login endpoint to return the challenge_id as an error in a pre-condition.
Update the WeWeb workflow to handle the challenge_id as an error response.
agent_instruction: Change the login endpoint to return challenge_id as an error and adjust the workflow accordingly.
